boundary: This profiler separates input construction, OptiX preparation, prepared query, and Python postprocess for compact spatial summaries. It does not authorize an RTX speedup claim without a real RTX run and review.

cloud_claim_contract.claim_scope: prepared OptiX fixed-radius count traversal for hotspot compact summaries
cloud_claim_contract.cloud_policy: do not start a paid pod for this app alone; include only in the single consolidated RTX batch after local readiness passes
cloud_claim_contract.non_claim: not neighbor-row output, not a full hotspot analytics system, and not a whole-app RTX speedup claim

goal: Goal811 spatial OptiX prepared-summary phase profiler
